title: Payment form
excerpt: Is it possible to create payment forms for the customer and link them to electronic payment gateways?

posts.author: edpillst (edpillst)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to create payment forms for the customer and link them to electronic payment gateways?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @edpillst,

Whilst it is possible to create a payment form through our workforms feature, we don’t recommend using the forms to submit or share credit-card details. Pending your desired electronic payment getaway system, you would need to explore third-party options or our apps marketplace as this isn’t currently supported natively.

posts.author: denlunev (Denis Lunev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @edpillst

Our team actually have been working on a payment integration for Monday that might be what you’re looking for.
It allows you to handle payments (Stripe/PayPal) directly within Monday, there is a ability to create payment forms or invoices.

I recently put together a video that explains how it works — if you’re interested, you can check it out here: DepositFix for Monday

Let me know if you have any questions or want more details!
